heading: Establishment of trout hatchery in Pisgah National Forest
label: 760–3 Establishment of trout hatchery in Pisgah National Forest
text: The Secretary of the Interior, after consulting with the Secretary of Agriculture, shall establish, construct, equip, operate, and maintain a trout hatchery at an appropriate location on the Davidson River in the Pisgah National Forest, North Carolina.
notes: AppropriationsSection 2 of act , authorized the appropriation of $375,000 to carry out the purposes of this section.June 18, 1956
